title: Living in Boulder Vlog 6 - 18 - 2018: Buying stuff

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a busy couple of days in Boulder: buying a washer/dryer with his mom, switching from CenturyLink to Xpedient internet for gigabit speeds, getting a new iPhone X and GoPro 6, and adding an e-bike motor kit to his road bike. He's excited about combining the new camera gear for YouTube videos and cycling content.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: very excited to switch from CenturyLink for gigabit speeds
enthusiastic about its camera for YouTube and ride filming
eager to be the fastest on the road; thinks he may be among the first in the area to use it
glad to have it since he listens to music while riding and needs car awareness

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent yesterday cleaning my room and toilet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom came by and we signed up for a payment plan credit card at Home Depot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We got a washer dryer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to get a new phone, so we went to Apple and Verizon to compare prices.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I signed up for Expedit internet service because they now serve my neighborhood and offer a gigabyte of speed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The Expedit internet installation is scheduled for Thursday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My washer dryer will be installed on Wednesday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got an iPhone 10 with 256 gigabytes of storage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm excited to see if the iPhone 10 can handle audiobooks and my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The iPhone 10 has a video camera that might improve my YouTube videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My GoPro died and the charger fell in, so I got a new one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I fixed my DreamWeaver password issue by resetting it from my computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My internet only works well when the cable is plugged in.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm looking forward to having better internet with Expedit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hooked up my bike with a motor that gives me 350 extra watts for 20 miles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might be the first person to use this motor setup on a bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have a bike that I can share with my girlfriend or roommate.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a radar computer for my bike that alerts me to cars approaching.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought energy gels and a holder for long rides.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm excited about all the new technology I'm getting at the same time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to go on a ride today but was super tired this morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I slept a lot after a long ride and still feel tired.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My girlfriend broke up with me, but I got a new one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I upgraded my bike radar to a newer model with a map feature.
